timing_interpretation.all_routes: query-major marginal latency after one family setup; later sibling routes may reuse an exact bounded computation and are not standalone-latency comparable
timing_interpretation.comparability: only standalone_best_route_timing values are compared as route latency; one-time setup latency is reported separately
timing_interpretation.standalone_best_route: second pass over the selected route alone, warm in-process, with no sibling-route cache priming; used for the family comparison table
